introSection: Wacky Worm is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Amusement Rides Factory currently owned & travelled by UK showman William Roberts. The coaster has been on loan at Coney Beach Pleasure Park since the 2021 season.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: In August 2025, the train came to a stop midride and the last car became disengaged with the track. 13 riders were injured.

fullText:
Wacky Worm is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Amusement Rides Factory currently owned & travelled by UK showman William Roberts. The coaster has been on loan at Coney Beach Pleasure Park since the 2021 season.





In August 2025, the train came to a stop midride and the last car became disengaged with the track. 13 riders were injured.
